text: Healthy living means taking care of your whole self, not just your body. A balanced diet gives you energy and supports your immune system, so try to include plenty of fruits, vegetables, and whole grains each day. Regular exercise, like walking or cycling, keeps your heart strong and helps you feel more awake. Getting enough sleep—typically seven to nine hours a night—is crucial for concentration and recovery. Don't forget your mental health, too: managing stress through hobbies or relaxation is just as important. Finally, a good work-life balance prevents burnout, ensuring you have time for yourself and the people you care about.
